OneStar.description:
Gains 1 <color=#1eff30>[Lightning Orb]</color> stack whenever an enemy receives a buff

<color=#1eff30>[Lightning Orb]</color> stacks have a 50% chance to protect a random buff from being stolen, removed, or transferred

Bonus Damage inflicted by each <color=#1eff30>[Lightning Orb]</color> stack is equivalent to 2% of an enemy Champion's MAX HP or 1% of a Boss' MAX HP

ThreeStars.description: Gains 1 <color=#1eff30>[Lightning Orb]</color> stack whenever an enemy receives a buff or has their Turn Meter filled

FiveStars.description: <color=#1eff30>[Lightning Orb]</color> stacks have a 75% chance to protect a random buff from being stolen, removed, or transferred

SixStars.description: Bonus Damage inflicted by each <color=#1eff30>[Lightning Orb]</color> stack is equivalent to 5% of an enemy Champion's MAX HP or 2.5% of a Boss' MAX HP

blessings.name: Lightning Cage
blessings.description:
Whenever an enemy receives a buff or has their Turn Meter filled, places one <color=#1eff30>[Lightning Orb]</color> stack on this Champion. 

When activated, a <color=#1eff30>[Lightning Orb]</color> stack randomly protects one other active buff from being removed, stolen, or transferred. After activation, the <color=#1eff30>[Lightning Orb]</color> stack disappears. A Champion can have a maximum of 3 <color=#1eff30>[Lightning Orb]</color> stacks at one time.

Whenever a Champion with 3 <color=#1eff30>[Lightning Orb]</color> stacks hits enemy targets, inflicts Bonus Damage to them based on their MAX HP. Bonus Damage can occur on each hit of a Skill, but does not count as an extra hit. After the Bonus Damage is applied, all active <color=#1eff30>[Lightning Orb]</color> stacks are removed from this Champion.

OneStar.description:
Strengthens your team's Aura by 2.5%
Weakens the enemy team's Aura by 5%

ThreeStars.description:
Strengthens your team's Aura by 7.5%
Weakens the enemy team's Aura by 10%

FiveStars.description:
Strengthens your team's Aura by 15%
Weakens the enemy team's Aura by 20%

SixStars.description:
Strengthens your team's Aura by 35%
Weakens the enemy team's Aura by 20%

blessings.name: Intimidating Presence
blessings.description:
Strengthens your team's Aura and weakens the enemy team's Aura.

If multiple Champions on the same team have Intimidating Presence, only one will work. If Champions on the same team have both the Intimidating Presence and Commanding Presence Blessings, only Intimidating Presence will work.

OneStar.description: +0.5% damage for each buff

ThreeStars.description: +1% damage for each buff

FiveStars.description: +1.5% damage for each buff

SixStars.description: +2% damage for each buff

blessings.name: Heavencast
blessings.description: Increases the damage inflicted by this Champion according to the number of buffs on them. Doesn't increase the damage from <color=#1eff30>[Poison]</color>, <color=#1eff30>[HP Burn]</color>, and <color=#1eff30>[Bomb]</color> debuffs.

OneStar.description: Decreases the damage received by 0.5%

ThreeStars.description: Decreases the damage received by 1%

FiveStars.description: Decreases the damage received by 1.5%

SixStars.description: Decreases the damage received by 2%

blessings.name: Iron Will
blessings.description: Decreases the damage this Champion receives according to the number of debuffs on them. Doesn't decrease the damage from <color=#1eff30>[Poison]</color>, <color=#1eff30>[HP Burn]</color>, and <color=#1eff30>[Bomb]</color> debuffs.

OneStar.description: 50% chance to restore destroyed MAX HP when healing. Restores destroyed MAX HP equal to 10% of the heal

ThreeStars.description: 75% chance to restore destroyed MAX HP when healing. Restores destroyed MAX HP equal to 15% of the heal

FiveStars.description: 100% chance to restore destroyed MAX HP when healing. Restores destroyed MAX HP equal to 20% of the heal

SixStars.description: 100% chance to restore destroyed MAX HP when healing. Restores destroyed MAX HP equal to 30% of the heal

blessings.name: Miracle Heal
blessings.description: Has a chance of restoring a portion of any destroyed MAX HP whenever this Champion heals themselves or an ally. The amount of HP restored is equal to a percentage of the heal.

OneStar.description: 5% chance of blocking debuffs

ThreeStars.description: 10% chance of blocking debuffs

FiveStars.description: 15% chance of blocking debuffs

SixStars.description: 30% chance of blocking debuffs (no cooldown)

blessings.name: Indomitable Spirit
blessings.description: Has a chance of blocking any <color=#1eff30>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1eff30>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1eff30>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1eff30>[True Fear]</color>, <color=#1eff30>[Freeze]</color>, and <color=#1eff30>[Provoke]</color> debuffs whenever an enemy tries to place them on this Champion. (1 Turn Cooldown)

OneStar.description: Starts Round with 1 <color=#1eff30>[Bone Armor]</color> stack; <color=#1eff30>[Bone Armor]</color> stacks decrease damage received by 20%

ThreeStars.description: Starts Round with 2 <color=#1eff30>[Bone Armor]</color> stacks

FiveStars.description: <color=#1eff30>[Bone Armor]</color> stacks decrease damage received by 30%

SixStars.description:
Starts Round with 3 <color=#1eff30>[Bone Armor]</color> stacks
Inflicts Bonus Damage when attacking; Bonus Damage adds 1 <color=#1eff30>[Bone Armor]</color> stack

blessings.name: Ward of the Fallen
blessings.description:
Starts each Round with a number of <color=#1eff30>[Bone Armor]</color> stacks. Each <color=#1eff30>[Bone Armor]</color> stack decreases the damage the recipient receives from a single hit, then disappears. A Champion can have a maximum of 3 <color=#1eff30>[Bone Armor]</color> stacks at one time.

High Awakening Bonus

Deals Bonus Damage to each enemy hit by this Champion. The number of times Bonus Damage is inflicted on each enemy target is equal to the number of dead allies. Bonus Damage is proportional to this Champion's ATK. Adds one <color=#1eff30>[Bone Armor]</color> stack for each instance of Bonus Damage inflicted.

Bonus Damage will not be inflicted when damaging enemies through Masteries, Passive skills, reflected damage, <color=#1eff30>[Poison]</color>, or <color=#1eff30>[HP Burn]</color> debuffs.

OneStar.description: Decreases enemy SPD by 2% for each active buff (up to 6%)

ThreeStars.description: Decreases enemy SPD by 3% for each active buff (up to 9%)

FiveStars.description: Decreases enemy SPD by 5% for each active buff (up to 15%)

SixStars.description: Instantly decreases the Turn Meters of all enemies by 15% whenever any enemy receives a third active buff

blessings.name: Temporal Chains
blessings.description:
Decreases each enemy's SPD for each active buff they are under, except for the buffs placed at the start of the Round.

High Awakening Bonus

Whenever an enemy receives a third active buff, instantly decreases the Turn Meters of all enemies by a certain amount. (4 Turn Cooldown)

OneStar.description: Increases the damage enemies receive from <color=#1eff30>[Poison]</color> debuffs by 50%

ThreeStars.description: Increases the damage enemies receive from <color=#1eff30>[Poison]</color> debuffs by 100%

FiveStars.description: Increases the damage enemies receive from <color=#1eff30>[Poison]</color> debuffs by 200%

SixStars.description: Will ignore 35% of each target's RES when placing <color=#1eff30>[Poison]</color> debuffs on enemy Champions

blessings.name: Lethal Dose
blessings.description:
Increases the damage enemies receive from <color=#1eff30>[Poison]</color> debuffs placed by this Champion in Arena and Siege battles.

High Awakening Bonus

Will ignore 35% of each target's RES when placing <color=#1eff30>[Poison]</color> debuffs on enemy Champions in the Arena and Siege battles.

OneStar.description: Decreases target DEF by 1% per hit (up to 10% for Champions; up to 5% for Bosses)

ThreeStars.description: Decreases target DEF by 1% per hit (up to 20% for Champions; up to 10% for Bosses)

FiveStars.description: Decreases target DEF by 2% per hit (up to 30% for Champions; up to 15% for Bosses)

SixStars.description: Decreases target DEF by 4% per hit (up to 40% for Champions; up to 20% for Bosses)

blessings.name: Cruelty
blessings.description:
Whenever this Champion hits an enemy, decreases their DEF until the end of the Round. Occurs once per hit.

If multiple Champions have this Blessing, still cannot decrease a single Champion's DEF by more than 40%, or decrease a Boss' DEF by more than 20%.

OneStar.description: 15% chance of inflicting Bonus Damage

ThreeStars.description: 30% chance of inflicting Bonus Damage

FiveStars.description: 75% chance of inflicting Bonus Damage

SixStars.description: 100% chance of inflicting Bonus Damage. 35% chance of inflicting a second instance of Bonus Damage

blessings.name: Phantom Touch
blessings.description:
Has a chance of inflicting Bonus Damage to one enemy whenever this Champion hits enemy targets. When hitting multiple targets at once, only one Champion will receive Bonus Damage. (1 Turn Cooldown) 

The Bonus Damage is proportional to this Champion's ATK.

High Awakening Bonus

Has a chance of inflicting a second instance of Bonus Damage.

OneStar.description: +1% damage for each dead ally

ThreeStars.description: +1.5% damage for each dead ally

FiveStars.description: +2.5% damage for each dead ally

SixStars.description: +5% damage for each dead ally

blessings.name: Dark Resolve
blessings.description: Increases the damage inflicted by this Champion according to the number of dead allies on their team. Doesn't increase the damage from <color=#1eff30>[Poison]</color>, <color=#1eff30>[HP Burn]</color>, and <color=#1eff30>[Bomb]</color> debuffs.

OneStar.description: Target HP threshold: 4%

ThreeStars.description: Target HP threshold: 8%

FiveStars.description:
Target HP threshold: 14%
Has a 50% chance of placing <color=#1eff30>[True Fear]</color> debuff for 1 Turn if the target survives the Reaper

SixStars.description:
Target HP threshold: 20%
Has a 100% chance of placing <color=#1eff30>[True Fear]</color> debuff for 1 Turn if the target survives the Reaper

blessings.name: Soul Reap
blessings.description:
When this Champion hits an enemy target and decreases their HP to a certain threshold, a Reaper will appear and deal extra damage equal to the target's remaining HP.

For AoE attacks, each target that has their HP reduced to the threshold in the attack, will be visited by a Reaper.

The Reaper will ignore DEF, as well as all damage reduction skills, effects, and buffs. Will not ignore damage reduction skills, effects, and buffs if the target is a Boss.

High Awakening Bonus

If the target survives, has a chance of placing a <color=#1eff30>[True Fear]</color> debuff for 1 turn. This debuff cannot be resisted or blocked.

OneStar.description: Destroys enemy MAX HP by 10%

ThreeStars.description: Destroys enemy MAX HP by 20%. Fills 10% of this Champion's Turn Meter

FiveStars.description: Destroys enemy MAX HP by 30%. Fills 20% of this Champion's Turn Meter

SixStars.description: Destroys enemy MAX HP by 40%. Fills 30% of this Champion's Turn Meter

blessings.name: Life Harvest
blessings.description:
Destroys enemies' MAX HP by a certain amount whenever they are revived.

Mid Awakening Bonus

Whenever enemies are revived, partially fills this Champion's Turn Meter for each enemy revived.

OneStar.description: 10% chance of removing debuffs

ThreeStars.description: 15% chance of removing debuffs

FiveStars.description: 20% chance of filling this Champion's Turn Meter by 20% when hit

SixStars.description: 25% chance of removing debuffs. 40% chance of filling this Champion's Turn Meter by 20% when hit

blessings.name: Chainbreaker
blessings.description:
At the start of this Champion's turn, has a chance of removing any <color=#1eff30>[Stun]</color>, <color=#1eff30>[Freeze]</color>, <color=#1eff30>[Sleep]</color>, <color=#1eff30>[Provoke]</color>, <color=#1eff30>[Fear]</color>, <color=#1eff30>[True Fear]</color>, or <color=#1eff30>[Petrification]</color> debuffs placed on this Champion. Only activates if this Champion is under any of these debuffs.

High Awakening Bonus

Whenever this Champion is hit by an enemy while under any of the debuffs mentioned above, has a chance of partially filling this Champion's Turn Meter. Occurs once per hit.

OneStar.description: Strengthens your team's Aura by 2.5%

ThreeStars.description: Strengthens your team's Aura by 7.5%

FiveStars.description: Strengthens your team's Aura by 15%

SixStars.description: Strengthens your team's Aura by 35%

blessings.name: Commanding Presence
blessings.description:
Strengthens your team's Aura.

If multiple Champions on the same team have Commanding Presence, only one will work. If Champions on the same team have both the Intimidating Presence and Commanding Presence Blessings, only Intimidating Presence will work.

OneStar.description: 3% of damage reflected

ThreeStars.description: 6% of damage reflected

FiveStars.description: 9% of damage reflected

SixStars.description: 15% of damage reflected

blessings.name: Faultless Defense
blessings.description: Whenever an enemy attacks an ally under an <color=#1eff30>[Increase DEF]</color> buff placed by this Champion, reflects a portion of the damage back to the attacker.

OneStar.description: +0.5% damage for each enemy

ThreeStars.description: +1% damage for each enemy

FiveStars.description: +1.5% damage for each enemy

SixStars.description: +3% damage for each enemy

blessings.name: Hero's Soul
blessings.description: Increases the damage inflicted to Bosses and their minions according to the number of living enemies.

OneStar.description: 15% chance of placing a <color=#1eff30>[Smite]</color> debuff

ThreeStars.description: 30% chance of placing a <color=#1eff30>[Smite]</color> debuff

FiveStars.description: 60% chance of placing a protected <color=#1eff30>[Smite]</color> debuff

SixStars.description: 100% chance of placing a guaranteed and protected <color=#1eff30>[Smite]</color> debuff

blessings.name: Brimstone
blessings.description:
Whenever this Champion attacks, each hit has a chance to place a <color=#1eff30>[Smite]</color> debuff for 2 turns.

Champions under the <color=#1eff30>[Smite]</color> debuff will be hit by a meteorite when they use an Active Skill. The meteorite inflicts damage equal to 25% of the affected Champion's MAX HP, and will also inflict damage to all other enemy Champions equal to 5% of their MAX HP.

Only one <color=#1eff30>[Smite]</color> debuff can be active per team at any point.

High Awakening Bonus

The <color=#1eff30>[Smite]</color> debuff will be protected and guaranteed.

OneStar.description: 5% chance of placing a <color=#1eff30>[Sheep]</color> debuff. This debuff requires ACC to be placed, and can be resisted.

ThreeStars.description: 10% chance of placing a <color=#1eff30>[Sheep]</color> debuff. This debuff requires ACC to be placed, and can be resisted.

FiveStars.description: 15% chance of placing a <color=#1eff30>[Sheep]</color> debuff. This debuff requires ACC to be placed, and can be resisted.

SixStars.description: 20% chance of placing an irresistible <color=#1eff30>[Sheep]</color> debuff.

blessings.name: Polymorph
blessings.description:
Has a chance of placing a <color=#1eff30>[Sheep]</color> debuff on enemy Champions for 2 turns whenever they place debuffs on this Champion, or when an enemy removes or steals buffs from them. Occurs once per enemy turn. This debuff cannot be blocked, or placed on Bosses.

Champions under <color=#1eff30>[Sheep]</color> debuffs lose access to their normal skills, and can only use the following <color=#1eff30>[Sheep]</color> skill:

Attacks 1 enemy. Any ally Sheep will join this attack. Has a 50% chance of removing the <color=#1eff30>[Sheep]</color> debuff from this Champion after attacking.

Whenever a <color=#1eff30>[Sheep]</color> debuff expires or the Sheep is defeated, the affected Champion will return to battle with 50% HP.

High Awakening Bonus

The <color=#1eff30>[Sheep]</color> debuff cannot be resisted.

OneStar.description: Increases damage from <color=#1eff30>[HP Burn]</color> debuffs by 25%

ThreeStars.description: Increases damage from <color=#1eff30>[HP Burn]</color> debuffs by 50%

FiveStars.description: Increases damage from <color=#1eff30>[HP Burn]</color> debuffs by 100%

SixStars.description: Decreases enemy Turn Meter when they receive damage from <color=#1eff30>[HP Burn]</color> debuffs

blessings.name: Incinerate
blessings.description:
Increases the damage inflicted by <color=#1eff30>[HP Burn]</color> debuffs placed by this Champion in Arena and Siege battles.

High Awakening Bonus

Whenever a <color=#1eff30>[HP Burn]</color> debuff placed by this Champion inflicts damage on an enemy, their Turn Meter will also be decreased by the same amount. Only works in Arena and Siege battles.

OneStar.description:
The first hit each Round will ignore a percentage of the target's DEF
Will ignore 1% DEF for every 50 Levels

ThreeStars.description:
The first hit each Round will ignore a percentage of the target's DEF
Will ignore 1% DEF for every 40 Levels

FiveStars.description:
The first two hits each Round will ignore a percentage of the target's DEF
Will ignore 1% DEF for every 25 Levels

SixStars.description:
Every hit will ignore a percentage of the target's DEF
Will ignore 1% DEF for every 10 Levels

blessings.name: Crushing Rend
blessings.description:
Each Round, a number of this Champion's hits will ignore a percentage of the target's DEF. The percentage of ignored DEF depends on the Level of the target.

High Awakening Bonus

Every hit this Champion inflicts will ignore a percentage of the target's DEF.

OneStar.description: Fills this Champion's Turn Meter by 5%

ThreeStars.description: Fills this Champion's Turn Meter by 7%

FiveStars.description: Fills this Champion's Turn Meter by 10%

SixStars.description: Fills this Champion's Turn Meter by 10%, (no turn restrictions)

blessings.name: Survival Instinct
blessings.description:
Partially fills this Champion's Turn Meter whenever a debuff is placed, spread, or transferred onto them. Occurs once per enemy turn.

High Awakening Bonus

The Turn Meter fill has no turn restrictions.

OneStar.description: Heals this Champion by 3% of their MAX HP

ThreeStars.description: Heals this Champion by 6% of their MAX HP

FiveStars.description: Heals this Champion by 9% of their MAX HP

SixStars.description: Heals this Champion by 15% of their MAX HP

blessings.name: Emergency Heal
blessings.description: Heals this Champion whenever a <color=#1eff30>[Shield]</color> buff placed on them expires, is removed, or is broken by an enemy attack. The value of the heal is equal to a portion of this Champion's MAX HP. (1 Turn Cooldown)

OneStar.description: Decreases the cooldown of the skill this Champion attempted to use by 1 turn. Fills 10% of this Champion's Turn Meter

ThreeStars.description: Decreases the cooldown of the skill this Champion attempted to use by 1 turn. Fills 15% of this Champion's Turn Meter

FiveStars.description: Decreases the cooldown of the skill this Champion attempted to use by 2 turns. Fills 25% of this Champion's Turn Meter

SixStars.description: Resets the cooldown of the skill this Champion attempted to use. Fills 50% of this Champion's Turn Meter

blessings.name: Harmonic Impulse
blessings.description:
Fills this Champion's Turn Meter whenever they lose their turn because of a <color=#1eff30>[Fear]</color> or a <color=#1eff30>[True Fear]</color> debuff.

Also decreases the cooldown of the skill they attempted to use whenever their turn is lost due to a <color=#1eff30>[True Fear]</color> debuff.

OneStar.description: Increases the damage inflicted to <color=#1eff30>[Stone Skin]</color> shields by 20%

ThreeStars.description: Increases the damage inflicted to <color=#1eff30>[Stone Skin]</color> shields by 40%

FiveStars.description: Increases the damage inflicted to <color=#1eff30>[Stone Skin]</color> shields by 60%

SixStars.description: Increases the damage inflicted to <color=#1eff30>[Stone Skin]</color> shields by 100%

blessings.name: Cracking Roots
blessings.description: Increases the damage inflicted by this Champion to <color=#1eff30>[Stone Skin]</color> shields.

OneStar.description: Increases the damage inflicted by this Champion by 2% for every debuff they place successfully (up to 6%)

ThreeStars.description: Increases the damage inflicted by this Champion by 2% for every debuff they place successfully (up to 8%)

FiveStars.description: Increases the damage inflicted by this Champion by 3% for every debuff they place successfully (up to 15%)

SixStars.description: Increases the damage inflicted by this Champion by 5% for every debuff they place successfully (up to 30%)

blessings.name: Nature's Wrath
blessings.description: Increases the damage inflicted by this Champion for every debuff they successfully placed, except debuffs placed by Gear Sets.

OneStar.description: 10% chance to place debuffs on weak hits against enemies under <color=#1eff30>[Poison Cloud]</color> buffs

ThreeStars.description: 20% chance to place debuffs on weak hits against enemies under <color=#1eff30>[Poison Cloud]</color> buffs

FiveStars.description: 40% chance to place debuffs on weak hits against enemies under <color=#1eff30>[Poison Cloud]</color> buffs

SixStars.description: 60% chance to place debuffs on weak hits against enemies under <color=#1eff30>[Poison Cloud]</color> buffs

blessings.name: Neutralize
blessings.description: Has a chance to place debuffs on weak hits when attacking enemies under <color=#1eff30>[Poison Cloud]</color> buffs.

OneStar.description: 15% chance to place a greater version of debuff

ThreeStars.description: 30% chance to place a greater version of debuff

FiveStars.description: 45% chance to place a greater version of debuff

SixStars.description: 60% chance to place a greater version of debuff

blessings.name: Nature's Bounty
blessings.description:
Whenever this Champion applies a 2.5% <color=#1eff30>[Poison]</color> debuff, a 25% <color=#1eff30>[Decrease ATK]</color> debuff, a 30% <color=#1eff30>[Decrease DEF]</color> debuff, a 15% <color=#1eff30>[Decrease SPD]</color> debuff, a 25% <color=#1eff30>[Decrease ACC]</color> debuff, a 50% <color=#1eff30>[Heal Reduction]</color> debuff, a 15% <color=#1eff30>[Weaken]</color> debuff, a <color=#1eff30>[Fear]</color> debuff, a 15% <color=#1eff30>[Decrease C. DMG]</color> debuff, a 15% <color=#1eff30>[Decrease C. RATE]</color> debuff, or a 25% <color=#1eff30>[Decrease RES]</color> debuff, has a chance to place a greater version of this debuff (for example, a 50% <color=#1eff30>[Decrease RES]</color> debuff instead of a 25% <color=#1eff30>[Decrease RES]</color> debuff.)

[Does not apply to debuffs placed by Gear Sets.]

OneStar.description:
Increases the value of the heal granted by <color=#1eff30>[Continuous Heal]</color> buffs placed by this Champion by 5%.
Restores destroyed MAX HP equal to 5% of the heal.

ThreeStars.description:
Increases the value of the heal granted by <color=#1eff30>[Continuous Heal]</color> buffs placed by this Champion by 10%.
Restores destroyed MAX HP equal to 10% of the heal.

FiveStars.description:
Increases the value of the heal granted by <color=#1eff30>[Continuous Heal]</color> buffs placed by this Champion by 15%.
Restores destroyed MAX HP equal to 15% of the heal.

SixStars.description:
Increases the value of the heal granted by <color=#1eff30>[Continuous Heal]</color> buffs placed by this Champion by 30%.
Restores destroyed MAX HP equal to 30% of the heal.

blessings.name: Nourish
blessings.description: Increases the value of the heal granted by <color=#1eff30>[Continuous Heal]</color> buffs placed by this Champion. Each <color=#1eff30>[Continuous Heal]</color> buff placed by this Champion restores a portion of the target's destroyed MAX HP.
